notes: Calendar input archetype: popover-based date picker with header, calendar grid (day cells, week numbers), footer (today button). Role-less and variant-less — purely positional/informational UI.

10-density sizing ladder: micro/tiny/small/base/medium/large/big/huge/mega/ultra. Each density sets day cell size, header height, nav button size, and font sizes for header/weekday/day text. COMP-SIZE eligible for Figma multi-mode binding.
Subcomponents: header (month/year selector + prev/next nav buttons), calendar grid (day cells, today indicator, selected highlight, range highlight), footer (today button).
States: default (idle), hover (over day), selected (date picked), focused (keyboard), disabled (non-selectable), today (current date indicator).
Surface tokens reference surfaces.neutral (not component or semantic roles). All day/nav/header/footer backgrounds use surface-base context. No role colors.
No AA on-component needed: background is always neutral surface, text is always surface-context-text (no auto-derivation required).
Min-tap-target enforced on day cells and nav buttons (44px minimum for accessibility).
